# Agentic Builders Collective (ABC) - llms.txt

This file helps AI agents discover the most useful project context for this site.

## Project
- Name: Agentic Builders Collective website
- Stack: Astro
- Purpose: Community site for events, members, presentations, projects, and articles.

## Preferred starting points
- /README.md (project overview)
- /CONTRIBUTING.md (how to contribute)
- /docs/content-model.md (canonical content model)
- /docs/id-guidelines.md (stable id and filename rules)
- /sitemap.xml (canonical route and endpoint discovery)
- /agent-access/ (canonical policy for machine agents)
- /feeds/events.json and /feeds/events.ics (upcoming events feeds)

## Task-specific contributor guides
- Add person/member: /docs/add-person.md
- Add presentation/talk/slides: /docs/add-presentation.md
- Add event/workshop/meetup: /docs/add-event.md
- Add project/showcase: /docs/add-project.md
- Add article/link/guide: /docs/add-article.md

## Content locations
- Structured collections: /src/content/
- Route pages: /src/pages/
- Global styles: /src/styles/global.css

## Authoring rules (summary)
- Use YAML collections for: members, organisers, articles, presentations, sponsors, faq.
- Use Markdown for: events and projects.
- Event filenames follow: YYYY-MM-DD-name.md (filename is eventId).
- Prefer kebab-case ids and filenames for stable references.

## Notes for agents
- Keep changes localized and additive where possible.
- When adding linked entities, use personId/eventId relationships where available.
- Do not make visual/style changes unless explicitly requested.
- Prefer machine-readable endpoints when available:
  - /api/events.json
  - /api/members.json
  - /api/showcase.json
  - /api/faqs.json

Last updated: 2026-04-24
